name: easy-paper
description: /easy-paper <slug-or-paper.md> — authors a layperson `.easy.paper.md` companion of a paper. Reads a PAPER/<slug>/ dir (per PAPER.tape roster) or a given paper .md, then produces `<slug>.easy.paper.md` with FOUR paper-specific sections: (1) 평이-초록 plain-language abstract, (2) ASCII figure sketches (the easy 4-template set), (3) 비유 섹션 analogy-driven explanation of the method/finding, (4) "이 논문이 한 일" one-paragraph what-it-did summary — all under the easy 7-element pattern. Source-of-truth = easy-auto/styles/easy.<lang>.md (point + summarize, not duplicated). Sidecar to the `paper` + `easy` plugins; reads only, never modifies the source paper. Triggers — "/easy-paper", "쉬운 논문 만들어", "논문 쉽게", "easy paper", "논문 일반인용".
